title: ASR Outdoor 6mm Sling Shot Ball Bearings Steel 50 Piece Set
description:
Hit your intended targets while out in the wilderness with the 50pc ASR Outdoor 6mm Slingshot Ball Bearings! This set of steel ball bearings are designed for long distance shots while hiking, camping, hunting or backpacking. This pack comes with 50 balls, so you'll be able to practice on a number of different targets. Up your sling shot skills and grab a few of these ball bearing packs!
